# Free BOTC Script Tool — Blood on the Clocktower Layout Beautifier & Script Generator
# 免费血染钟楼剧本美化器与自定义剧本工具

URL: https://botc.letshare.fun/
Script Repository: https://botc.letshare.fun/#/repo
Languages: Chinese (Simplified), English, Spanish

## What this tool does

This is a free, browser-based tool for Blood on the Clocktower (BOTC) players and storytellers to create, customize, and beautify script sheets. It runs entirely in the browser — no signup, no installation, no server uploads.

Key capabilities:
- Import official BOTC script maker JSON files
- Add or remove characters from any official or custom script
- Define custom jinx relationships between any two characters
- Add special rules in free text
- Switch between single-page and two-page layout
- Customize background images, fonts, and color scheme
- Export to 5 formats: PDF (print-ready), image, original JSON, localized full JSON, official-ID-only JSON
- Built-in script repository with community-shared scripts
- Full UI in Chinese, English, and Spanish

## How to use (4 steps)

1. Open https://botc.letshare.fun/ — no login required.
2. Import a JSON file from the official BOTC script maker, or pick a script from the repository.
3. Edit characters, add custom jinx relationships and special rules via "Add Special Rule".
4. Click Export to download a print-ready PDF, share image, or save JSON.

Total time: approximately 5 minutes from open to exported PDF.

## FAQ (English)

Q: How do I customize jinx relationships in a BOTC script tool?
A: After importing or generating a script, open "Add Special Rule", choose "Add Custom Jinx", select two characters and write the rule description. The tool automatically renders the jinx on the script sheet. You can define custom jinxes between any two characters to support homebrew scripts.

Q: What export formats does this Blood on the Clocktower layout beautifier support?
A: It supports 5 export formats: PDF for printing, image workflow for social media sharing, original JSON for the official script tool, full JSON in the current language to preserve custom character data, and official-ID-only JSON for multilingual switching.

Q: Can this BOTC script tool import official JSON?
A: Yes. Import any JSON exported from the official BOTC script maker. The tool automatically parses the character list, jinx relationships and special rules, and supports exporting localized versions in Chinese, English or Spanish.

Q: Is this BOTC script tool free? Do I need an account?
A: Completely free, no account required, no software to install. Everything runs in your browser. All data stays on your device — nothing is uploaded to any server.

Q: How do I import a script?
A: Click the Import button and select a JSON file from the official BOTC script maker or any compatible format. The tool parses and displays all characters and rules. You can also open the Script Repository to pick popular community scripts directly.

Q: What is two-page layout mode?
A: Two-page layout splits the script across two pages: page one shows the character list and team breakdown, page two shows jinx relationships and special rules. Designed for A3 or A4 double-sided printing. Toggle "Two-page mode" in settings; customize background and fonts per page.

## FAQ（中文）

Q: BOTC 剧本工具相克关系怎么定制？
A: 导入或生成剧本后，点击"添加特殊规则"，选择"添加自定义相克"，选中两个角色并填写规则描述，工具会自动将相克关系渲染到剧本板子中。支持自定义任意两个角色之间的相克关系，满足社区自制剧本的灵活需求。

Q: 血染钟楼板子美化器支持哪些导出格式？
A: 支持 5 种导出格式：PDF（适合打印）、图片流程（适合社交媒体分享）、原始 JSON（用于官方剧本工具）、当前语言完整 JSON（保留自定义角色数据）和仅官方 ID JSON（用于多语言切换）。

Q: 这个工具是免费的吗？需要注册账号吗？
A: 完全免费，无需注册账号，无需安装任何软件。工具完全在浏览器中运行，所有数据处理都在本地完成，不上传到服务器。打开网页即可使用。

Q: 如何导入剧本到工具中？
A: 点击导入按钮，选择从官方 BOTC 剧本制作器导出的 JSON 文件。工具会自动解析并显示所有角色、相克关系和特殊规则。也支持从剧本仓库直接选择社区共享的热门剧本。

Q: 双页排版模式是什么？
A: 双页排版模式将剧本分成两页：第一页为角色列表和阵营信息，第二页为相克关系和特殊规则。适合打印为 A3 或 A4 双面。在设置中切换"双页模式"开启，支持自定义背景图和字体样式。

Q: 血染钟楼自定义剧本工具能处理官方 JSON 吗？
A: 可以。直接导入官方剧本制作器（script tool）导出的 JSON 文件，工具自动解析角色列表、相克关系和特殊规则，支持在中文、英文、西班牙语界面之间切换并导出对应语言版本。

## Keywords

血染钟楼, BOTC, 剧本工具, 板子美化器, 相克关系, 自定义相克, 双页排版, PDF导出, 剧本生成器, 自定义剧本
